name: Blade Mantis
bio: An agile assassin with razor limbs, it moves unseen and kills without warning.

skills.name: Murder
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to 210% of Attack Damage + 100.

skills.name: Bloodthirst
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage to opponent equal to (120% of Attack Damage + 100), and heal for (20% of Magic Power + 50).

skills.name: Twin Blades
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage equal to (70% of Attack Damage + 300), then deal the same amount of Physical Damage.

skills.name: Empty Slot
skills.description: This character has no fourth ability.

ultimate.name: Ravage
ultimate.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to (44% of Attack Damage + 88) eight times.
